What We Offer

Two Services, One Mission

Keeping your dog happy, exercised, and loved — whether you're at work, traveling, or just need a hand.

🦮 Our #1 Service

Dog Walking

We come to your home and take your pup on a fun, energizing walk through your neighborhood. Great exercise, fresh air, and plenty of tail wags guaranteed.

  • ✅ 30 or 60 minute walks
  • ✅ GPS-tracked route
  • ✅ Photo updates sent to you
  • ✅ Post-walk report card
  • ✅ We come to your home
30 min $30 60 min — $45
🏠 Perfect for Busy Days

Drop-In Visits

Can't make it home? We stop by your house to check on your dog, refresh food and water, give some love, and make sure everything is okay.

  • ✅ 30-minute check-in visits
  • ✅ Food & water refresh
  • ✅ Playtime & cuddles
  • ✅ Photo updates sent to you
  • ✅ In your dog's own home
30 min visit $25 per visit

Why Hendo's Hounds

Care You Can Actually Trust

🦮

We Come To You

No drop-offs, no kennels. Your dog stays in their own neighborhood and routine — comfortable and stress-free.

👨‍👩‍👧

Family Run

Brianna & Zack treat every dog like their own. Personal, attentive care every single time.

📸

Photo Updates

We send photos and updates after every walk and visit so you always know your pup is happy.

📍

Local & Reliable

Proudly serving Southwest Wisconsin. We're your neighbors — and we take that seriously.

Our Story

Meet Brianna & Zack

We're the Hendersons — a husband-and-wife team from Southwest Wisconsin who built Hendo's Hounds out of one simple belief: every dog deserves to feel safe, loved, and cared for — even when their family can't be there.

Our two pups, Louie (our Blue Heeler) and Carter (our Yellow Lab), are the heart of everything we do. They inspired us to start this business and remind us every day why we love it.
